role: Junior AI Engineer (formerly AI Engineer Intern)
responsibilities: Architected a FastMCP server exposing 15+ project management APIs as MCP tools, enabling an OpenAI-powered agent to dynamically select and invoke endpoints based on user intent — eliminating hardcoded routing logic entirely.

Designed a dual-source RAG pipeline combining ChromaDB vector embeddings (for documentation) and a Neo4j graph database (for codebase relationships), improving retrieval accuracy over flat-embedding approaches.
Built a 3-agent orchestration pipeline (intent classifier → hybrid retriever → response synthesizer) to deliver grounded, context-aware answers from heterogeneous knowledge sources.

Engineered an async document intelligence system using Redis-backed dual workers — one for AI embedding ingestion, one for Neo4j graph construction — processing 500+ legacy property documents with relationship extraction across configurable rule sets.
Integrated speaker diarization pipelines using Pyannote.audio and AWS Transcribe to extract per-speaker analytics from audio recordings for enterprise use cases.
Implemented OpenAI embeddings and vector storage workflows to power semantic search across large enterprise knowledge bases.
achievements: Exposed 15+ project management APIs as MCP tools for natural language application control.
Processed 500+ legacy property documents asynchronously using Redis and Neo4j relationship mapping.
